author: max
name: HoneyCombs
install_msg:
Thanks for installing. Run `[p]honeycombs` to start the game.
If you enjoy my work, you can donate at [buymeacoffee](<https://buymeacoffee.com/ltzmax>)
end_user_data_statement: This cog saves Discord user IDs to add you to the games you participate in, but these IDs are deleted once the game concludes. It does not store any End User Data.
